# Data Model Checklist: Compute Commute Accessibility for Work Access Evaluation

**Purpose**: Validate data model requirements completeness and alignment with the feature spec.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/011-commute-accessibility/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all data items listed in the spec explicitly defined with fields and types? [Completeness, Spec §Data Involved]
- [x] CHK002 Are fields defined for commute metrics, target counts, and neutral outputs? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK003 Are fields defined for fallback distance method usage and default weighting usage? [Completeness, Spec §Alternate Flows]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK004 Are constraints for commute metrics (non-negative, units consistent) represented? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK005 Is determinism across repeated runs represented in the model or metadata? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK006 Do acceptance scenarios and functional requirements agree on omission behavior for coordinate-unresolved cases? [Consistency, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK007 Are data representations defined for coordinate-resolution failure outcomes? [Coverage, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
